headline: Mark Cuban Slams Viral TikTok Scammers For Faking Shark Tank Endorsements To Sell Products: 'It's Messed Up...I Hope They Get Busted'
summary: Several viral TikTok videos falsely portrayed Mark Cuban endorsing products by manipulating "Shark Tank" footage, prompting the billionaire to denounce the deceptive clips as "messed up" and call for action against such scams.

headline: Elon Musk Takes A Swipe At Minnesota Governor Tim Walz As TSLA Stock Surges 45% In One Month: 'How's Your Day, Bro?'
summary: Elon Musk took a public jab at Minnesota Governor Tim Walz after Tesla stock surged nearly 45% in a month, clapping back at earlier criticism with a pointed post on X.
